# SEC (美国证券交易委员会)

SEC (美国证券交易委员会) is a key entity in finance and economics. Closely related to [[quantitative-trading]], [[blockchain]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
